source_jobs.title: Playable Ad Developer
source_jobs.description:
At Medialicious, we’re a global growth marketing partner powering the expansion of fast-growing social gaming brands. Headquartered in Gibraltar, our mission is simple: lead the industry through deep expertise, ongoing innovation, and strategic scale.
We partner with leading app developers and publishers to produce high-performing creative, and we’re now looking for a talented Playable Ad Developer to help us build engaging, interactive experiences for our clients in the social gaming space.


ROLE OVERVIEW

As a Playable Ad Developer, you will oversee the full lifecycle of playable ad production—from early concepting to technical execution and deployment. You will work closely with our creative, design, and performance marketing teams to build highly engaging HTML5-based playable ads that showcase polished social casino gameplay and drive user acquisition at scale.


KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Develop high-quality, lightweight playable ads using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript.

 - Build engaging interactive experiences using game frameworks such as Phaser.js or Pixi.js.

 - Integrate creative assets (sprites, reels, animations, UI elements, etc.) to accurately replicate Vegas-style slot gameplay and other casino mechanics.

 - Optimize playable ads for maximum performance, ensuring fast load times and smooth animation across devices, placements, and ad networks.

 - Implement and troubleshoot integrations with major mobile ad network SDKs (e.g., Unity Ads, Google AdMob, ironSource).

 - Support creative A/B testing through variations, refinements, and performance-driven adjustments.

 - Collaborate with designers, motion artists, and performance teams to ensure playable ad concepts align with campaign goals.

 - Stay up to date with mobile advertising trends, HTML5 game development best practices, and evolving platform requirements.


QUALIFICATIONS

 - Proven experience as a Playable Ad Developer, HTML5 Game Developer, or similar technical role.

 - A strong portfolio showcasing playable ads, interactive demos, or lightweight HTML5 games.

 - Strong proficiency in JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3.

 - Hands-on experience with at least one HTML5 game framework (Phaser.js, Pixi.js, or similar).

 - Familiarity with technical specs and requirements of major mobile ad networks.

 - Solid understanding of performance optimization techniques for mobile-focused web applications.

 - Strong problem-solving skills, technical curiosity, and attention to detail.

 - Excellent communication and collaboration abilities.


PREFERRED (NOT REQUIRED)

 - Experience with 2D animation tools such as Adobe Animate, Spine, or similar.

 - Background in mobile game development, especially casual or casino genres.

 - Experience with version control tools like Git.


REQUIRED FOR APPLICATION

A portfolio showcasing rich, fully developed playable ads you have created end-to-end.

source_jobs.title: Senior Affiliate Manager
source_jobs.description:
At Medialicious, we’re a global growth marketing partner powering the expansion of fast-growing social gaming brands. Headquartered in Gibraltar, our mission is simple: to be the industry leader through deep domain expertise, constant innovation, and strategic scale.


Our Marketing team drives growth through a channel-agnostic approach, empowered by significant budgets and a collaborative, transparent culture. We embrace experimentation, research, and performance analysis to maximize growth and evolve our strategies. With data at our core and curiosity in our DNA, we work together to create meaningful, measurable impact.

The Role:
We’re on the lookout for an experienced Senior Affiliate Manager to lead our multi-brand acquisition efforts. This is a high-impact, hands-on role suited to someone who is data-savvy, commercially sharp, and passionate about forging and scaling affiliate and influencer partnerships.



Responsibilities:

 - Drive affiliate outreach strategies across multiple brands and markets

 - Identify and engage new partners through networking and outbound efforts

 - Present compelling value propositions to potential partners

 - Create a commercial playbook with target commercials (CPA based) and negotiate with affiliates based on those

 - Conduct research to identify growth opportunities and refine acquisition tactics

 - Review tools and processes to enhance automation and scalability in affiliate operations

 - Ensure all campaigns comply with media platform and regional advertising regulations

 - Collaborate closely with the broader acquisition team to share insights and innovations

 - Safeguard and elevate brand visibility through top-tier placements

 - Document best practices and create scalable, repeatable processes

 - Monitor affiliate activity to prevent traffic cannibalisation



Requirements:

 - Fluent in English, with excellent verbal and written communication

 - Strong analytical and numerical skills

 - Experience in affiliate marketing within the iGaming industry

 - Proven track record managing high-performing affiliate relationships

 - Well-connected in the iGaming space, particularly in the U.S. market

 - Strong grasp of postbacks, pixels, and partner implementation

 - Comfortable with flexible hours and occasional travel

 - Tech-savvy with a solid understanding of marketing tracking systems

 - Familiar with SEO content and tools

 - Strategic thinker with a good grasp of the marketing mix and cross-channel dynamics

 - Experience with Appsflyer

 - Experience using Affiliate platforms

source_jobs.title: Creative Strategist lead - Maternity Cover
source_jobs.description:
At Medialicious, we're a global growth marketing partner powering the expansion of fast-growing social gaming brands. Headquartered in Gibraltar, our mission is simple: to be the industry leader through deep domain expertise, constant innovation, and strategic scale.

Our Marketing team drives growth through a channel-agnostic approach, empowered by significant budgets and a collaborative, transparent culture. We embrace experimentation, research, and performance analysis to maximize growth and evolve our strategies. With data at our core and curiosity in our DNA, we work together to create meaningful, measurable impact.

The Role

You'll own creative strategy across our US Social Casino portfolio, leading a creative pod and translating performance data into winning concepts that drive real results.



What you will be doing

• Own creative strategy for Social Casino accounts across Paid Social, Programmatic, and App Store channels

• Generate concepts and briefs for UGC, influencer, Motion Graphics, and Playable content that convert

• Lead and mentor a small team of strategists, copywriters, and video editors while maintaining high creative standards

• Write scripts and shape storyboards for video content, working with both in-house teams and external creators

• Partner with media buyers to analyze performance data and turn insights into the next round of creative iterations

• Build winning frameworks and maintain a library of high-performing angles, hooks, and creative approaches



What we are looking for

• Proven creative strategy experience at a performance-driven agency or in-house team with measurable results

• Deep UGC and influencer expertise – you know how to use these as performance levers, not just brand plays

• Strong scriptwriting skills and comfort shaping video content from concept to final cut

• Data fluency – CTR, CPI, ROAS, hook rates, and retention curves should be second nature

• Team leadership experience with the autonomy to operate without constant oversight

• Thrives in fast-paced environments where briefs evolve and iteration is constant



Why you will love it

This is a senior role with real autonomy on accounts that test more, ship more, and learn faster than most agencies. You'll have the budget and freedom to experiment, the data to prove what works, and a team that values results over politics. Plus, it's fully remote with competitive compensation and the chance to shape creative strategy in one of the most competitive verticals online.

---

We hire based on skills, drive, and ideas—nothing else. Your background, gender, age, race, ethnicity, disability, sexual orientation, religion, neurodiversity, or educational path will never be a barrier to joining us. We also welcome candidates from non-traditional career journeys and value diverse perspectives that challenge conventional thinking. Diversity fuels our innovation, collaboration, and growth, and we're committed to creating an environment where everyone can contribute their best work and thrive.

notes: Playable Ad Developer role suggests some tech presence, but majority of roles are marketing-focused.
